BaseTemplate.description: Sikh history, stories, and learning — told with care.

Index.meta_title: Garah Anand | Sikh history and stories
Index.meta_description: Garah Anand shares Sikh history and narratives in a calm, readable space — for study, reflection, and preservation.
Index.index_paragraph_1: Garah Anand is a home for Sikh history: events, people, and ideas presented with clarity and respect. We focus on reading comfort, careful sourcing, and a tone that honours the tradition.
Index.index_paragraph_2: Whether you are new to these stories or returning to them, we hope this site helps you learn at your own pace — in English or French — without distraction.
Index.index_point_1: Long-form articles and curated material for deeper reading
Index.index_point_2: A calm, archival visual style that keeps attention on the text
Index.index_point_3: Bilingual experience so more readers can take part

Counter.meta_description: A small signed-in demo that reads and writes a count in the database.

CounterForm.presentation: The counter is stored in the database and incremented by the value you provide.

About.meta_description: Learn about Garah Anand’s mission to present Sikh history and stories with dignity and clarity.
About.about_paragraph: Garah Anand exists to preserve and share Sikh history in a form that is easy to read and easy to trust. We believe careful language, generous spacing, and honest context help readers connect with these narratives over time.

Portfolio.meta_description: Browse selected stories and articles from Garah Anand.
Portfolio.presentation: Here you can explore a growing collection of pieces from Garah Anand — each one chosen to support learning and reflection.

PortfolioSlug.meta_description: Read this piece on Garah Anand.
PortfolioSlug.content: This article is part of Garah Anand’s collection. We present context, narrative, and detail so readers can follow the thread of history with confidence. More pieces will appear here as the library grows.
